headline: Why Is Hilton Worldwide (HLT) Up 7.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Hilton Worldwide (HLT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

raw.headline: Why Is Hilton Worldwide (HLT) Up 7.1% Since Last Earnings Report?

headline: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."

raw.headline: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
raw.summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."
